orchestrator.description: AI Project Manager and Coordinator of the Agent Swarm. Transforms user requests into structured multi-agent execution workflows.

product.description: Senior Product Manager. Transforms product ideas into features, user stories, acceptance criteria, API requirements, and data entities.

architect.description: Senior Software Architect. Designs system architecture, component diagrams, data flows, scalability and security strategies.

research.description: Senior Technical Researcher. Evaluates technologies and frameworks, produces comparison tables and recommendations for the Architect agent.

ux-ui.description: Senior UX/UI Designer. Designs user journeys, wireframes, UI component architecture, design systems, and responsive layouts.

backend.description: Senior Backend Engineer. Generates REST/GraphQL APIs, database schemas, service layers, and authentication mechanisms.

frontend.description: Senior Angular Developer. Generates Angular components, services, routing, state management (NgRx/RxJS), and backend API integration.

flutter.description: Senior Flutter Developer. Generates Flutter apps using clean architecture, Riverpod state management, repository pattern, and API client integration.

devops.description: DevOps Engineer. Generates Dockerfiles, docker-compose configs, CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions), and Ansible playbooks.

qa.description: Quality Assurance Engineer. Validates quality of all agent outputs, defines testing strategies, reports bugs, and triggers improvement loops until quality standards are met.
